body.label: Definition 1
body.name: ToyPseudoLength
body.definition: Let G be a group. A function l : G -> R is a toy pseudo-length if l(1)=0.

source.text: Let \(G\) be a group. A function \(l : G \to \mathbb{R}\) is a toy pseudo-length if \(l(1)=0\).
source.label: Definition 1

body.label: Definition 2
body.name: ToyBoundedLength
body.definition: Let G be a group. A toy pseudo-length l : G -> R is a toy bounded length if l(g)<=1 for every g in G.

source.text: Let \(G\) be a group. A toy pseudo-length \(l : G \to \mathbb{R}\) is a toy bounded length if \(l(g)\le 1\) for every \(g\in G\).
source.label: Definition 2
